calendar.matters:
Petition For Authorization To Pay Debt Of Beneficiary And For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Stephenson for Wells Fargo Bank (Trustee).

The Court granted the petition and ordered the amount of $102,012.00 be paid from the trust to the Veterans Administration for benefits deposited in error (signing the order for the same).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: Maureen Howard CSR#7156. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.

Petition For Authorization To Pay Debt Of Beneficiary And For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-24-2007 Continued To Oct-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
